other_observers: These birds have been seen by lots of birders over this winter. Kyle Carsen was there at the same time for this observation. I also saw the birds on 1/17/22 with Sandi Jepsen observing.
description:
Behavior -.both birds stayed on the water surface during the whole
observation. They swam from NE corner past the Sailboard Launch and continuing around
toward the campground area. Calls - none heardFinder – not sure but the first observers listed on eBird is Chris
Knight and Al Garder on 1/8/22Age/Plumage – These blocky headed loons had
light creamy yellow bills, straight upper mandible, tipped up bill posture, light
all the way to the culmen, and were bigger than the Common Loons in the vicinity.
The neck was noticeably thicker as well. The birds were in basic/winter
plumage.
